sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35764" key="e)nnako/sioi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννᾰκόσιοι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐννᾰταῖος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔννᾰτος</orth>, <sense id="n35764.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐνακ-, ἐνατ-.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
